# UC-13.6.10 · Grafana Organization and Folder Permission Change Audit

## Description

Overly broad folder grants expose customer data on shared Grafana stacks. Auditing permission mutations provides detective control and speeds reviews when suspicious sharing is reported.

## Value

Supports least-privilege programs and demonstrates access monitoring to auditors.

## Implementation

Enrich `object_uid` with folder title via lookup. Route alerts on `action=remove` paired with `role=Editor` in public folders. Integrate with ITSM change tickets for expected bulk updates.

## SPL

```spl
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:audit"
| search (folder OR organization OR team OR "permission") AND (action="*update*" OR action="*add*" OR action="*remove*" OR action="*delete*")
| stats count, values(permission) as perms, latest(_time) as t by object_uid, user, action
| where count >= 1
| sort -t
```

## Visualization

Table (user × folder × action), timeline, count by role granted.

## References

- [Grafana — Permissions](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/administration/roles-and-permissions/access-control/)
